'''Corellian air cake'''<ref name="LE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref> was a simple<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Air Cake}}</ref> dessert [[Cake/Legends|cake]]<ref name="SWG" /> originally created on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="Planetnamia" /> Corellian air cake was made from [[dough]] and [[carbosyrup]], with a [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] core.<ref name="SWG" /> Corellian air cake was served aboard the luxury [[Hovertrain/Legends|repulsortrain]] [[Gem of Alderaan]]<ref name="GA">{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}</ref> and at the annual [[Vor-cal Feast]] held aboard the [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />
